title: /Users/masayuki/Dev/claude-config/.claude 内容を表示せよ
summary_text: - **`/vote` smoke acknowledgment literal is drifted.** Active contract requires exact line `Kernel vote mode is active.` ([vote.md:20](/Users/masayuki/.codex/prompts/vote.md#L20)), but readiness check enforces `Local consensus mode is active.` ([check-kernel-vote-readiness.sh:323](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/scripts/check-kernel-vote-readiness.sh#L323)), and the unit stub is aligned to the old text ([test-check-kernel-vote-readiness.sh:37](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/tests/test-check-kernel-vote-readiness.sh#L37)). **Risk:** valid current prompt behavior is flagged as failure; obsolete behavior can pass. - **`/kernel` smoke contract is drifted to pre-smoke bootstrap semantics.** Active smoke contract is exactly 3 lines and stop: active line, requirements-packet bootstrap line, marker ([kernel.md:20](/Users/masayuki/.codex/prompts/kernel.md#L20), [kernel.md:21](/Users/masayuki/.codex/prompts/kernel.md#L21), [kernel.md:23](/Users/masayuki/.codex/prompts/kernel.md#L23), [kernel.md:94](/Users/masayuki/.codex/prompts/kernel.md#L94)). Readiness check instead requires `Bootstrap target: 6+ lanes (minimum 6).`, `Lane manifest:`, and >=6 lane bullets ([check-kernel-vote-readiness.sh:108](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/scripts/check-kernel-vote-readiness.sh#L108), [check-kernel-vote-readiness.sh:109](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/scripts/check-kernel-vote-readiness.sh#L109), [check-kernel-vote-readiness.sh:113](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/scripts/check-kernel-vote-readiness.sh#L113)). Tests hardcode the same old output ([test-check-kernel-vote-readiness.sh:49](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/tests/test-check-kernel-vote-readiness.sh#L49), [test-check-kernel-vote-readiness.sh:50](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/tests/test-check-kernel-vote-readiness.sh#L50)). **Risk:** prompt-compliant smoke output fails readiness gate. - **Readiness gate is coupled to launcher-internal synthetic flags not defined by prompt contract.** Kernel smoke is invoked with `CODEX_KERNEL_PROVIDER_CHECK` / `CODEX_KERNEL_SYNTHETIC_SMOKE_AFTER_BOOTSTRAP` ([check-kernel-vote-readiness.sh:331](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/scripts/check-kernel-vote-readiness.sh#L331), [check-kernel-vote-readiness.sh:335](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/scripts/check-kernel-vote-readiness.sh#L335)), and tests require these flags to be consumed ([test-check-kernel-vote-readiness.sh:206](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/tests/test-check-kernel-vote-readiness.sh#L206), [test-check-kernel-vote-readiness.sh:210](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/tests/test-check-kernel-vote-readiness.sh#L210)). **Risk:** readiness breaks on valid prompt implementations that do not honor private launcher flags. - **Strict provider-probe hard dependency is outside smoke prompt contract and can fail closed before smoke validation.** Required mode fails when bridge/node is unavailable ([check-kernel-vote-readiness.sh:236](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/scripts/check-kernel-vote-readiness.sh#L236), [check-kernel-vote-readiness.sh:245](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/scripts/check-kernel-vote-readiness.sh#L245)), while smoke-mode contracts are output-only and explicitly no-tools inside prompt handling ([kernel.md:19](/Users/masayuki/.codex/prompts/kernel.md#L19), [vote.md:19](/Users/masayuki/.codex/prompts/vote.md#L19)). **Risk:** environment/network/bridge issues are misclassified as prompt contract failures.
